title: Meowfault 16x
description: "Meowfault 16x is a cute and clean 16x texture pack that blends the simplicity of default Minecraft with subtle feline-inspired flair. Perfect for PvP or casual play, it keeps things smooth, stylish, and a little bit catty!
body:
Meowfault 16x is a cute and clean 16x texture pack that blends the simplicity of default Minecraft with subtle feline inspired flair. Perfect for PvP or casual play, it keeps things smooth, stylish, and a little bit catty!

**INFO**
- Texture Pack releases will be for 1.21.5 - 1.21.11, 1.21.11 is always the safest option because it will always work since i develop the pack using it
